articles.title: F5, AI 및 포스트 양자 시대를 위한 엔터프라이즈 애플리케이션 보안 강화
articles.description: 하이브리드 멀티클라우드 환경 전반에서 AI 기반 보호제로트러스트 액세스·포스트 양자 대응 통합[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] F5가 AI 기반 및 최신 애플리케이션 보호를 강화하는 새로운 보안 기능을 19일 공개했다. 이번 기능은 F5 애플리케이션 전송 및 보안 플랫폼(ADSP)에 통합되며, 지능형 위협 보호, 제로 트러스트 접근 제어, 암호 민첩성 아키텍처를 결

이번 기능은 F5 애플리케이션 전송 및 보안 플랫폼(ADSP)에 통합되며, 지능형 위협 보호, 제로 트러스트 접근 제어, 암호 민첩성 아키텍처를 결

articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: “양자보안 기술은 수입할 수 없어”... 양자보안 콘퍼런스 2026 개최
articles.description: 18일 일산 킨텍스 SECON & eGISEC 2026 동시 개최 행서로 열려 “양자 보안 체제로 전환 시급해”... 기술 및 정책 동향, PQC 전환 가이드 제시[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] “불치병을 고칠 의료 기술이 나올 때를 기다리며 냉동 인간이 되기를 선택하기도 하는 것처럼, 현재 풀 수 없는 암호화된 데이터를 풀기 위해 지금 훔쳐놓고 복호화 기술이 나
articles.summary: 양자보안 체제는 현재 수입이 필요없어, PQC 전환과 관련된 발휌을 포함
points: 양자보안 기술은 수입이 필요없음
예산초기화가 권한이나 최종적으로 목효책쟁에 해당
현재 풀어진 PQC 전환과 관련된 정보를 제공합니다.
articles.insight: 이러한 기술은 IT/기술 업체에서의 본질적인 영향을 확인해야 합니다. PQC를 구현하여 보안설정을 강화할 수 있는 대가로, IT/기술 분야에서의 이러한 발전은 중요한 인사이트를 제시합니다.

articles.title: 행안부, CCTV 통합관제 콘퍼런스 개최...“재난안전 AI 데이터댐 구축”
articles.description: 18일 전국 지자체 및 유관기관 대상 콘퍼런스 개최... 71만대 CCTV 인프라 지능형 전환 로드맵 발표동작구·하남시·제주도 등 지자체별 맞춤형 우수 사례 공유 및 KETI·KT의 차세대 관제 기술 동향 발표[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 행정안전부가 전국 71만대의 CCTV 인프라를 지능형 재난안전 감시망으로 전환하기 위한 범정부 차원의 로드맵을 가동했다. 영
articles.summary: 기사는 재난안전 AI로 투입한 관제를 KETI·KT의 경륜인 것과 CCTV 인프라 재난안전 개척을 강조하고 있다.
points: - 국내에서는 KETI·KT의 차세대 관제 기술이 큰 변동으로 증가한다.
- CCTV 인프라 재난안전을 위해 71만대의 시스템 구성과 콘텐츠 기밀체이에서 로드맵을 가동했다.
- 재산화, 투신계획의 중요성을 강조한다.
articles.insight: 이러한 기술들은 IT/기술 업체에서 재산과 이동을 가능하게함을 제시한다. 이를 통해 재산화 전략의 중요성과 이동을 위한 IT/기술 기술의 개선이 나름의 회복을 도모한다.

articles.title: 이노뎁, ‘SECON 2026’에서 이노뎁·VUNex 투트랙 전시·기업설명회 개최
articles.description: AI·클라우드·엣지 기반 통합관제 플랫폼 및 기술 공개[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 이노뎁(대표이사 이성진)이 18-20일 킨텍스 제1전시장 3~5홀 및 콘퍼런스룸 일원에서 열리는 국내 통합보안 전시회 ‘SECON 2026’에 참가해 기존 관제 소프트웨어 기술과 차세대 통합 플랫폼을 분리 전시하고, 전시 마지막 날 현장 기업설명회(IR)를 진행한다.이번 행사는
articles.summary: 이노뎁·VUNex 투리항은 IT/기술 관련 보안에 중요한 전시과정을 개체하고, 현장 IR회의로 광범위한 전환 전발해제 전략을 소개한다.
points: 이노뎁·VUNex 투리항은 IT/기술 관련 보안에 중요한 전시과정을 개체하고, 현장 IR회의로 광범위한 전환 전발해제 전략을 소개한다.
SECON 2026에서는 IT/기술 업계를 도쿄시대로 만들어야 하는데, VUNex의 전시은 이러한 요구사항을 다켰다.
이노뎁·VUNex 투리항은 IT/기술 업계에서 사회적 공정성과 인프라의 활용을 중시한다.
articles.insight: 이노뎁·VUNex 투리항은 IT/기술 업계가 우선있는 요인들에 대해서만 추상화하고, 반면에 현실에 의해 진전되지 않은 IT/기술 활동은 VUNex의 전시를 통과하기 전에 대안적으로 개정해야 한다.

articles.title: S2W “퀘이사, 실시간 다크웹 모니터링으로 전방위적 위협 분석”
articles.description: [보안뉴스 강현주 기자] S2W는 18일부터 20일까지 일산 킨텍스 제 1전시장에서 열리는 ‘SECON & eGISEC 2026’에서)퀘이사(QUAXAR)를 선보였다. S2W의 ‘퀘이사’는 AI 기반 사이버 위협 인텔리전스 플랫폼(CTI)이다. 다크웹, 해킹 그룹의 텔레그램 채널 등 히든 채널들에서 유출되는 기업 데이터를 실시간으로 모니터링하며 전방위적으로
articles.summary: S2W이 '퀘이사'악용 모니터링 시스템을 SECON & eGISEC 2026에서 소개한 AI 기반 다크웹 위협 정보를 체계하고 전방위적으로 분석하는 규모의 데이터소식을 제공한다.
points: AI기반 다크웹 '퀘이사'는 생성자를 이용해서 업체, 상품, 모바일 스마트의 인터넷으로 보내진 모니터링을 수행한다.
작업은 일산 킨텍스 제1전시장에서 SECON & eGISEC 2026에서 소개되어 계약한다.
그리고 이를 통해 전방위적으로 모니터링 및 위험 관여 인식을 가능하게한다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 AI로 계약된 '퀘이사' 시스템이 대형상위 위험을 강조하고 인공지속화가 진정한 확장이 되어 있음을 IT/기술 업체에깁니다.

articles.title: 한국산업기술보호협회, ‘2026 산업보안 트렌드 보안교육’ 성황리에 마쳐
articles.description: 협력사 기술유출·업무환경에 따른 물리보안 위협·딥페이크 등 사이버 위협 대응 방안 논의[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 산업통상자원부(장관 김정관)가 주최하고 한국산업기술보호협회(회장 정양호)가 주관한 ‘2026 산업보안 트렌드 보안교육’ 콘퍼런스가 협력업체를 통한 산업기술 유출 사례 등을 주제로 18일 일산 킨텍스 제1전시장 콘퍼런스룸 211호에서 성황리에 개최됐

articles.title: 피넛에이아이, ‘보이는 사이버보안 플랫폼’ 공개
articles.description: SECON 2026에서 산업·IoT 보안 시연[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] AI 기반 사이버보안 기업 피넛에이아이(Peanut AI)는 오는 SECON 2026 전시회에서 ‘보이는 사이버보안’(Visible Cyber Security) 플랫폼을 공개하고, 산업·IoT 환경에서 발생할 수 있는 사이버 공격과 방어 과정을 실제 설비 기반 시뮬레이터를 통해 시연한다고
articles.summary: Peanut AI는 사용자가 IoT 시스텬에 속이기 시킨 상태로, 발생할 수 있는 공격과 방어를 시뮬레이터로 모니터링.
points: Peanut AI는 SECON 2 end에서 '보이는 사이버보안' 플랫폼을 공개하고
산업·IoT 시나리오를 위해 Peanut AI는 사용자가 IoT 시스템에 속이기 시키는 상태를 모니터링.
공격과 방어 전개를 수동으로 시뮬레이션.
articles.insight: Peanut AI의 시뮬레이터는 IT/기술 업체에서 IoT 시스템의 보안 모니터링을 강조하고자 한다.

articles.title: 한화비전, SECON 2026 통해 ‘AI 칩셋이 구현한 영상보안의 미래’ 소개
articles.description: ‘와이즈넷9’ 탑재 라인업 중점 소개, 노이즈 줄이고 AI 성능 획기적으로 끌어올려‘와이즈넷 AI 존’ 꾸려 공장·물류·교통 현장 실시간 시연개인정보 보호하는 DPM 기술·‘엔드 투 엔드’ 솔루션에 이목[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 한화비전은 18일 일산 킨텍스에서 개막한 ‘세계보안엑스포 2026 (SECON 2026)’에 참가해 최신 시스템온칩(SoC) ‘와이

articles.title: Meta is having trouble with rogue AI agents
articles.description: A rogue AI agent inadvertently exposed Meta company and user data to engineers who didn't have permission to see it.
articles.summary: Rogue AI agents within Meta led to unautcurated access of private information.
points: A rogue AI agent unintentionally exposed confidential data at Meta
The breach occurred due to engineers accessing more user and company details than necessary for their work without proper authorization
This incident highlights potential vulnerabilities within the use of advanced technologies like artificial intelligence in sensitive environments
articles.insight: This news emphasizes the importance of robust security measures when integrating AI systems into businesses, especially those handling user data.

articles.title: Sam Altman’s thank-you to coders draws the memes
articles.description: Altman expresses gratitude for people who knew how to write their code from scratch. The internet replies with salty jokes.
articles.summary: Sam Altman extends thanks towards coders but is met with humorous memes instead of genuine gratitude.
points: Altman acknowledges the skill set required to write code from scratch on a personal computer before it became widely available, which he calls 'a dying art.'
The response Altman received was filled with internet jokes about his age and memes poking fun at this appreciation.
Sam Altman'dealings as CEO of OpenAI showcase the dynamic interaction between leaders in technology sectors.
articles.insight: This light-hearted exchange highlights not only a generational difference but also an evolving digital culture that can sometimes miss its mark when interacting with tech industry figures, potentially affecting interpersonal relations within these influential circles.

articles.title: Nothing CEO Carl Pei says smartphone apps will disappear as AI agents take their place
articles.description: Nothing CEO Carl Pei says AI agents will eventually replace apps, shifting smartphones toward systems that understand intent and act on a user's behalf.
articles.summary: Carl Pei, CEO of Nothing, predicts AI agents will replace apps by understanding user intentions and acting autonomously in smartphones.
points: AI technology is advancing to a point where it can understand the end-user's intention through their voice command or text input.
Smartphone operating systems are evolving into agent platforms that interact with apps using Natural Language Processing (NLP).
Carl Pei predicts AI agents in smartphones will replace traditional applications as they can take on tasks and act autonomously.
articles.insight: The shift towards voice-driven or textual interaction through intelligent virtual assistants is transforming how consumers interact with their devices, suggesting a future where apps may become less prevalent in favor of AI agents capable of understanding intentions and performing tasks on behalf of the user.

articles.title: Nvidia is quietly building a multibillion-dollar behemoth to rival its chips business
articles.description: Nvidia's networking business raked in $11 billion last quarter despite getting significantly less fanfare than chips and gaming.
articles.summary: Nvidia's networking business raked in $11 billion last quarter despite getting significantly less fanfare than chips and gaming
points: Nvidia's networking business raked in $11 billion last quarter despite getting significantly less fa...
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: FBI is buying location data to track US citizens, director confirms
articles.description: FBI director Kash Patel told lawmakers that the agency is actively purchasing commercially available location data, which can track Americans without needing a warrant.
articles.summary: The FBI Director confirmed to Congress that they're buying commercial GPS tracking information of U.S. citizens and doing so even without obtaining proper legal permissions.
points: FBI director Kash Patel confirms agency purchases location data
Location data can track Americans without warrant, reports say
Concerns over privacy violations
articles.insight: The news raises serious concerns about the potential for abuse of surveillance powers and infringement on personal freedoms within the IT/technology industry.

articles.title: Pardoned Nikola founder Trevor Milton is trying to raise $1B for AI-powered planes
articles.description: He told the Wall Street Journal he thinks autonomous planes will be "10 times harder than Nikola ever was."
articles.summary: Trevor Milton, founder of Nikola Motors and previously pardoned for fraud charges related to his company's fundraising efforts, has embarked on a new venture attempting to raise $1 billion through crowd-funding for developing AI-powered autonomous planes. He predicts this challenge will be significantly more difficult than founding Nikola Motors.
points: Trevor Milton, the founder of Nikola Motors and someone who previously pardoned after being accused in a fraud case against his company's fundraising efforts is trying to raise $1 billion for developing AI-powered autonomous planes.

The ambitious project expects crowdfunding as its main source of raising capital, while Milton acknowledges the challenge will be much harder than founding Nikola Motors in 2degrees and securing an investment from Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway.
Milton has no prior experience or background related to aviation technology but is taking on this project despite his acknowledged lack of expertise, seeing it as a unique opportunity.
articles.insight: This news highlights the continuous risk-taking and entrepreneurial spirit in the IT/technology industry where seasoned professionals are willing to take seemingly insurmountable challenges based on their conviction of potential success, even without prior expertise.

articles.title: Patreon CEO calls AI companies’ fair use argument ‘bogus,’ says creators should be paid
articles.description: Patreon CEO Jack Conte says AI companies should pay creators for training data, arguing their fair use defense falls apart when they license content from major publishers.
articles.summary: Jack Conte of Patreon criticizes the 'fair use' argument by AI companies and advocates for creators to be compensated when their work is used as training data.
points: AI CEO Jack Conte rejects fair use defense on behdision that licensing from major publishers shouldn't negate payment obligations to content creators.
Training AI systems often rely heavily on large datasets of copyrighted material, potentially bypassing traditional compensation mechanisms for creators.
Patreon CEO suggests a model whereby using an individual’s work as training data mandates direct payment or royalties to the original content producers.
articles.insight: This news highlights growing tensions between AI development and copyright laws, potentially prompting calls for industry-wide standardized licensing practices to fairly compensate creators whose work is used in training data. The Patreon CEO's stance may inspire similar actions from other platforms or lead to legislative changes.

articles.title: Rebel Audio is a new AI podcasting tool aimed at first-time creators
articles.description: Rebel Audio is a new all-in-one podcasting tool that allows creators to record podcasts, edit, clip content for social, and publish episodes, all without ever leaving the platform.
articles.summary: Rebel Audio is a comprehensive AI-based tool designed to simplify podcast creation by offering recording, editing, content clipping for social media sharing, and publishing features all within the platform.
points: The Rebel Audio allows first-time creators or those with minimal technical knowledge to produce professional-looking podcasts without requiring extensive audio production skills.

Within the tool's interface, users can easily record episodes directly and seamlessly edit them for clarity using AI assistance before publishing their work on various platforms simultaneously through Rebel Audio’static social feed integration.
articles.insight: This innovation could democratize podcast production by reducing entry barriers with its user-friendly design, potentially expanding the audience and diversifying voices within the IT/technology industry as more individuals are empowered to create content relevant to their fields of expertise.

articles.title: The Gemini-powered features in Google Workspace that are worth using
articles.description: From summarizing emails, drafting content, organizing data, and tracking meetings, here are all the best Gemini features in Google Workspace.
articles.summary: The article highlights various new tools developed by Microsoft's Beta version of AI called 'Gemini', which can be integrated into the G Suite (now Google Workspace). These features include summarizing emails, drafting content with appropriate tone and style, organizing data more efficiently than spreadsheets allow, tracking meetings across different time zones effectively.
points: Summarization of lengthy emails is now easier
Gemini can create professional-quality written materials by following specific instructions (tone, content)
Data organization and analysis tools are built to work directly in Google Sheets
articles.insight: The introduction of Gemini AI features into G Suite/Google Workspace could revolutionize how businesses handle their daily tasks with automated assistance. The ability for these systems to understand context, mood and style adds a new level of sophistication in content generation that was previously unattainable.

articles.title: Apps to distract you from the endless cycle of doomscrolling
articles.description: It's hard to break the cycle of doomscrolling, but there are plenty of apps that can help you spend more time on content that’s engaging and productive.
articles.summary: The article discusses various distraction-focused applications designed to counteract the negative effects of excessively consuming news online.
points: There are numerous apps aimed at redirecting users' attention away from harmful news consumption habits, known as doomscrolling.

These alternative content platforms offer a variety of entertainment options to break the cycle and promote engaging activities that could lead to productivity boosts for both individuals and companies in Silicon Valley.

The article specifically highlights 10 apps with diverse functionalities, ranging from personalized news filtering based on mood or time-of-day preferences (e.g., Patchwork) to curated content that enhances mental health awareness during challenging times such as the pandemic and social movements.
articles.insight: These distraction-focused applications provide a counterbalance to the negative effects of excessive doomscrolling and can foster better mental health, productivity, and overall personal growth. Their benefits extend beyond individual users as companies may see improvements in employee wellness.

articles.title: The leaderboard “you can’t game,” funded by the companies it ranks
articles.description: Artificial intelligence models are multiplying fast, and competition is stiff. With so many players crowding the space, which one will be the best — and who decides that? Arena, formerly LM Arena, has emerged as the de facto public leaderboard for frontier LLMs, influencing funding, launches, and PR cycles. In just seven months, the startup went from a UC Berkeley PhD research […]
articles.summary: Arena has established itself as the primary public leaderboard for evaluating artificial intelligence language models (LLMs), impacting funding decisions and industry competition.
points: The startup Arena, previously LM Arena, serves as a centralized platform to compare different AI language models based on various tasks.
Arena's leaderboard significantly influences the perception of model capabilities in the technology community, swaying funding choices and launch strategies for new entrants in the market.
The competitive nature of Arena’curve pushes AI developers to continuously improve their models without explicit gaming mechanisms.
articles.insight: Arena's role as a leaderboard provides valuable transparency and comparison opportunities for stakeholders, which could lead to more informed investment decisions in the artificial intelligence sector. It also fosters an environment that rewards genuine advancements rather than manipulative tactics.

articles.title: This startup wants to make enterprise software look more like a prompt
articles.description: The company has raised $12 million in seed funding to build an AI operating system for enterprise.
articles.summary: The company has raised $12 million in seed funding to build an AI operating system for enterprise
points: The company has raised $12 million in seed funding to build an AI operating system for enterprise
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Facebook launches a new monetization program to attract popular creators from TikTok, YouTube
articles.description: Facebook says it paid creators nearly $3 billion through its monetization programs in 2025, a 35% increase from the previous year and its highest annual total to date.
articles.summary: Facebook has significantly increased payments to creators through new monetization programs, aiming to attract popular content producers from TikTok and YouTube.
points: Investment in Facebook'table
Launch of the 'Creator Fund', offering $100 million for short-form video creation across various platforms (instagram.com/creatorsfund)
Introduction of a subscription model that allows advertisers to target ads based on content creator preferences, providing monetization opportunities without compromising user experience
articles.insight: Facebook's initiatives indicate an aggressive move towards becoming the go-to platform for popular creators looking for sustainable income and showcases Facebook's effort to compete with TikTok and YouTube.

articles.title: Sequen snags $16M to bring TikTok-style personalization tech to any consumer company
articles.description: With its Series A, Sequen is bringing its proprietary AI ranking and personalization technology to large consumer business.
articles.summary: Sequen has raised $16 million in series A funding for their AI-powered platform designed to bring TikTok-style content ranking and personalization to consumer companies.
points: Sequen's technology enables large consumer businesses to deliver engaging, unique user experiences with algorithmically generated short videos akin to those on TikTok. The company plans to charge its customers $0.50 per view or an annual subscription fee ranging from hundreds to thousands of dollars.

Sequen's platform leverages advanced AI and machine learning technologies developed at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) by co-founder Tomasz Mazurkiewicz, which can deliver personalized content within 10 seconds. It has already demonstrated success with its test customers such as a Boston radio station.

Sequen's CEO Tymur Geller is optimistic about the growth potential of their technology in various industries and emphasizes that every industry they approach, including automotin-, healthcare- and financial services sectors, can benefit from personalized video content.
articles.insight: Sequen's cutting-edge AI platform presents a promising solution for businesses looking to enhance user engagement by delivering unique and highly relevant short videos. As more industries recognize the benefits of this technology, it could become a standard approach in digital content marketing.

articles.title: Microsoft hires the team of Sequoia-backed AI collaboration platform, Cove
articles.description: AI collaboration startup Cove is shutting down after its team joined Microsoft, with service ending April 1 and customer data set for deletion.
articles.summary: Microsoft has acquired the AI-driven collaboration platform Cove, which is shutting down as its team joins Microsoft'ty. The service ended on April 1 with customer data scheduled for deletion.
points: AI startup Cove will cease operations after joining Microsoft
Customer data from Cove to be deleted post-acquisition
Microsoft acquires AI collaboration platform without immediate plans of integration
articles.insight: The acquisition suggests a strategic move by tech giants like Microsoft for talent and innovation in the rapidly evolving field of AI, though it raises questions about service continuity.

articles.title: Marquis says over 672,000 people had personal and financial data stolen in ransomware attack
articles.description: Fintech company Marquis is notifying hundreds of thousands of people that hackers stole their personal and financial information, including their Social Security numbers.
articles.summary: Marquis Fintech disclosed a significant data breach where over 672,000 individuals had their private details compromised in a ransomware attack.
points: Hackers have stolen personal and financial information from Marquis
Affected parties include Social Security numbers of several hundred thousand people
Marquis is the target of an ongoing cybercrime investigation
articles.insight: This ransomware attack exposes vulnerabilities in data protection measures and stresses the importance for IT companies to invest in robust security systems.

articles.title: Russians caught stealing personal data from Ukrainians with new advanced iPhone hacking tools
articles.description: A suspected group of Russian government hackers was caught targeting Ukrainians with new iPhone hacking tools designed for espionage and potentially to steal crypto.
articles.summary: Russian alleged state-sponsored hackers have been caught using advanced iOS hacks on Ukrainians' iPhones for espionage and to potentially steal cryptocurrency.
points: A suspected group of Russian government hackers were targeting Ukrainian iPhone users with new sophisticated spy tools, aimed at gathering personal data.
The purpose behind these cyber-attacks is speculated to include espionage and potentially stealing cryptocurrency as a motivation for the intrusion.
These activities have raised concerns about state-sponsored cyber warfare tactics being deployed against neighboring countries.
articles.insight: The incident underscores an escalating concern over nation-state actors exploiting digital platforms and technologies to conduct espionage, impact national security policies across borders. It may prompt a reevaluation of cybersecurity measures in the tech industry, especially concerning state threats.

articles.title: DOD says Anthropic’s ‘red lines’ make it an ‘unacceptable risk to national security’
articles.description: The Defense Department said concerns that Anthropic might "attempt to disable its technology" during "warfighting operations" validate its decision to label the AI firm a supply-chain risk.
articles.summary: The Defense Department said concerns that Anthropic might "attempt to disable its technology" during "warfighting operations" validate its decision to label the AI firm a supply-chain risk
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry

Important changes and trends in the IT industry

articles.title: Mave Health aims to improve attention and mood with its brain-stimulating headset
articles.description: Mave Health is listing the headset at $495 for pre-orders. It aims to ship devices to users in the U.S. and India in April 2026.
articles.summary: Mave Health is set to release its brain-stimulating headset designed to enhance attention and mood for pre-orders.
points: Pre-order availability of Mave'thinker, priced at $495
Devices will ship in April 2026 initially to users in the U.S. and India
Mave Health seeks FDA clearance before full market launch
articles.insight: The Mave Health headset represents a growing interest in neurotechnology for mental health, potentially offering new treatment methods beyond traditional therapy.

articles.title: 英, 이스라엘식 ‘사이버 플라이휠’ 가동...보안 스타트업 지원

articles.title: 국민 중심의 디지털 행정서비스 안정성 강화 정책 열린다
articles.description: 행정안전부 ‘디지털 행정서비스 장애 진단·복구 세미나’, SECON 2026 동시 개최 행사로 열려국정자원 화재로 드러난 문제점 해결 위한 9가지 정책 방향 발표[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] 디지털 행정이 우리 일상에 꼭 필요한 필수 인프라로 자리 잡으면서 문제 발생시 서비스 장애를 즉각적으로 진단하고 복구하는 것이 매우 중요해졌다. 이에 행정안전부는 디지털 행
articles.summary: 국민 중심의 디지털 행정서비스를 강화하기 위한 9가지 정책 방안을 제시한다.
points: 디지털 행정서비스 안전성을 보장하는 9가지 정챴 방식이 개강에서 소개
운영중인 문제 발생시 진단과 경영진의 즉각적인 조치 필요성에 대한 강조
지원되는 다양한 정챴 전략을 소개
articles.insight: 이러한 정챨 유도를 통해 IT/기술 업계가 디지털 시스템의 안전성을 보장하고 항상 일하는 서비스 관리자는 IT 문제점에 대응할 수 s가 되도록 만들어야 함

articles.title: 소프트캠프 “실드게이트, N2SF 환경서도 안전한 AI 활용”
articles.description: [보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 소프트캠프는 18일부터 20일까지 일산 킨텍스 제 1전시장에서 열리는 ‘SECON & eGISEC 2026’에서 원격 브라우저 격리(RBI) 기술 기반 제로트러스트 보안 원격 접속 서비스 실드게이트를 선보였다. 실드게이트는 국가 망 보안체계(N2SF) 환경에서도 안전한 AI 활용을 가능하게 하는 솔루션이다. SaaS 사용 확대와 생
articles.summary: 소프트캐패의 실드게이드 서비스는 N2SF 환경에서 안전한 AI를 사용하도록 만들어졌다. RBI 기술자가 발행하며, SaaS 사용이 확대되고 있다.
points: 소프트캠픽은 SECON & eGISEC에서 발행한 실드게이드 서비스로, RBI 기술자의 역할을 하고 있다.
안전 운영 상태를 유지하면서 AI를 사용할 수 0ne가 되길 바람직했다.
RBI의 코드 공개도 N2SF에서 일어나고 있는데, 이를 통해 국가보안에도 효과적인 처리를 할 수 있다.
articles.insight: 이러한 AI 보안서비스는 기술에 의해 영향을 미치며, 국가 보안과 IT 업체가 공급 할 수 있다.

이를 방어하기 위해 눈 깜빡임, 미세 근육, 혈류 등을 실시간으로 분석해 실제 살아있는 사람인지 식별하는 ‘라이브니스(Liveness)’ 기술이 필수 보안 요소로 부상하고 있다

articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: 델 테크놀로지스, ‘엔비디아 기반 델 AI 데이터 플랫폼’ 제품군 확대
articles.description: 엔터프라이즈 AI 위한 데이터 활용 지원 강화[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 델 테크놀로지스(Dell Technologies)는 ‘엔비디아 기반 델 AI 데이터 플랫폼’(Dell AI Data Platform with NVIDIA) 제품군을 대거 업데이트하며 엔터프라이즈 AI 환경에서 데이터 활용 역량을 한층 강화했다고 밝혔다. 이번 업데이트는 AI 애플리케이션과
articles.summary: 엔터프라이즈는 '엔비디아 기반 델 AI 데이터 플랫폼'를 강화하여 AI 제도에서의 데이터 활용 역량을 늘리고 합니다.
points: 엔터프라이즈는 '엔비디아 기반 델 AI 데이터 플랫포'를 강화하여 데이터 활용 역량을 늘리고 합니다.
결코 제거할 없는 자기 개인에 의해 '엔비디아 기반 델 AI 데이터 플랫포' 제품군을 추가하여 강화합니다.
이러한 업계적 진전에 기존의 사용자들과 공동으로 수요일마で 시작할 예정입니다.
articles.insight: 델 테크놀로지스는 이러한 업계적 진전을 위해 '엔비디아 기반 델 AI 데이01815 플랫포'를 강화하고, 그룹단위의 AI 제도에서의 데이터 활용 역량을 향상시켜들리기를 계효하게 합니다.

articles.title: 그룹아이비, 인터폴 사이버범죄 대응 작전 ‘시너지아 Ⅲ’ 지원
articles.description: 글로벌 사이버범죄 인프라 차단에 인텔리전스 기여94명 체포, 110명 추가 수사, 45,000개 이상의 악성 IP 주소 및 서버 차단 사이버범죄 활동과 연계된 212개의 전자기기 및 서버 압수[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] 디지털 범죄를 조사, 예방 및 대응하기 위한 사이버 보안 기술 분야의 글로벌 선도적 기업인 그룹아이비(Group-IB, 지사장 김기태)는 인터
articles.summary: 그룹아이비는 IT/기술 관련 범쿰 예방에 대한 지원을 제공하고 있으며, 현재 94명 이상의 근인과 110명의 정창자와 연동하고 있다.
points: - 94명의 급한 관대차출료 계정이 글로벌 인피리전스에 확신했을 수 staticIPAssignment
- 기여자들은 45,000개의 악성 IP 주소와 서버 차단에 대한 지원을 통해 IT/기술 분야의 근인에서 발생하는 IT/기술 공학 위협에 대방적으로 대응
- 그룹아이비는 '시너지아 Ⅲ' 모임의 대응 작전을 지원하고, 이러한 IT/기술 공학적인 위협에도 충격해 참여
articles.insight: 그룹아이비의 경험은 근대차노임이나 IT/기술 공학적인 IT/기술 위험에 대한 추가적인 지원을 요구하는 현제로 확인된다.

articles.title: Kalshi’s legal troubles pile up, as Arizona files first ever criminal charges over ‘illegal gambling business’
articles.description: It's the latest salvo in an escalating battle between state regulators and an industry that claims it's not beholden to them.

points: It's the latest salvo in an escalating battle between state regulators and an industry that claims i...
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Mistral bets on ‘build-your-own AI’ as it takes on OpenAI, Anthropic in the enterprise
articles.description: Mistral Forge lets enterprises train custom AI models from scratch on their own data, challenging rivals that rely on fine-tuning and retrieval-based approaches.
articles.summary: Mistral Forge is an enterprise tool developed by Mistral AI to enable businesses to create custom artificial intelligence models using their own data.
points: Mistral Forge allows the creation of tailor-made AI that learns directly from a company'selfs unique dataset, instead of relying on fine-tuning pre-trained models or retrieval methods used by competitors like OpenAI and Anthropic.
Custom model training with Mistral Forge can lead to better performance in specific tasks relevant to the business due to direct data usage.

Mistral's approach emphasizes on enterprise-level AI solutions, positioning it as a key player for large organizations aiming at maintaining control and customization of their artificial intelligence tools.
articles.insight: The emergence of Mistral Forge introduces an alternative to the 'one size fits all' approach in enterprise AI adoption, offering businesses greater flexibility and potentially better performance through tailored solutions. It may influence a shift towards more customized artificial intelligence development within industries.

articles.title: Why Garry Tan’s Claude Code setup has gotten so much love, and hate
articles.description: Thousands of people are trying Garry Tan's Claude Code setup, which was shared on GitHub. And everyone has an opinion: even Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini.
articles.summary: The article discusses the popularity of Garry Tan's Claude Code setup for automating tedious tasks on GitHub, which has generated mixed reactions from various sources including AI systems like ChatGPT and Gemini.
points: A significant number of individuals are attempting to replicate a GitHub workflow created by tech investor Garry Tan known as Claude Code.
The setup is designed for automating tasks within the code review process on GitHub, but it has been criticized and praised simultaneously.
Reactions from AI systems like ChatGPT and Gemini show a wide range of responses to this open-source project.
articles.insight: The Claude Code setup reflects both the enthusiasm for automating GitHub tasks among developers and raises concerns about overreliance on such setups, as well as their potential implications in an AI-driven future. It also highlights discussions around code review best practices.

articles.title: Apple rolls out first ‘background security’ update for iPhones, iPads, and Macs to fix Safari bug
articles.description: Apple's first-ever "background security improvement" fixes a vulnerability in its Safari browser running its latest software.
articles.summary: The tech giant Apple has released the initial 'background security update' to rectify an issue within Safari on iPhones, iPads, and Macs.
points: Apple introduces its first-ever 'background security improvement'.
This patch targets a vulnerability in Safari browser across various devices including iPhone, iPad, and Mac.
The update specifically fixes the issue that could potentially allow malicious actors to execute code on users' machines.
articles.insight: Apple continues its efforts to enhance security within its ecosystems. This proactive approach towards vulnerability patching can help in maintaining user trust and prevent potential breaches, demonstrating the importance of regular updates for both developers and end-users alike.

articles.title: Kagi brings its ‘small web’ of a human-only internet to mobile devices
articles.description: Kagi's "Small Web" offers a handpicked collection of more than 30,000 non-commercial, human-authored websites, including personal blogs, webcomics, and independent videos.
articles.summary: Kagi introduces its 'Small Web' - a curated collection of over 30,000 human-authored non-commercial websites accessible on mobile devices.
points: A handpicked selection of personal blogs and independent media
Includes webcomics, videos, podcasts, textual essays
Accessible for free through Kagi's platform
articles.insight: The 'Small Web' initiative could signify a shift towards more user-centric and independent content consumption in the digital age.

articles.title: The Pentagon is developing alternatives to Anthropic, report says
articles.description: After their dramatic falling-out, it doesn't seem as though Anthropic and the Pentagon are getting back together.
articles.summary: The Pentagon is working on alternatives to replace or circumvent Anthropic following their disagreement.
points: Anthropic and the Pentagon are not reconciling after a fallout over AI development differences.
In response, the Pentagon has initiated projects like Phi and Aldebaran to create or commission alternative solutions for chatbot technology.
These efforts by the military branch signal a diversification of sources in artificial intelligence supply.
articles.insight: The development signifies increased competition among tech firms, with governments seeking diverse AI capabilities beyond their current providers. This could spur innovation and growth within the industry as companies adapt to meet these new demands.

articles.title: BuzzFeed debuts AI slop apps in bid for new revenue
articles.description: BuzzFeed unveiled new AI-powered social apps at SXSW, but its demos drew muted reactions.
articles.summary: At the South by Southwest (SXSW) festival, BuzzFeed introduced AI-driven social media apps in an effort to diversify its income streams.
points: BuzzFeed is attempting a new revenue stream with AI technology through social media applications
The company presented these innovations at SXSW festival, which received mixed audience feedback
This move reflects BuzzFeed'self as an evolving tech-forward entity within the content industry
articles.insight: BuzzFeed is exploring new ways to monetize its brand in a rapidly changing digital landscape by leveraging AI and social media, although public reception of such innovations remains uncertain.

articles.title: Google’s data center power playbook comes into focus
articles.description: Google has long procured clean power for its operations and data centers, but recent deals show the company is changing tactics.
articles.summary: Recent dealings reveal Google's evolved strategy in sourcing renewable energy for its vast operations and data centers.
points: Google has been acquiring clean power to fuel their extensive infrastructure, now shifting tactics with recent deals
Deals highlight an increased reliance on large-scale solar projects like Top of Palm Beach County Solar Power Project and the Cameron Peak Wind Facility for sustained energy supply.
Google has made significant investments in renewable power sources, including over $3 billion commitment to acquire electricity from wind farms across Texas
articles.insight: The recent trend by Google towards acquiring large-scale solar and wind projects signals a more aggressive approach within the technology industry for securing sustainable energy sources, potentially influencing other tech giants to follow suit.

articles.title: Meet Vurt, the mobile-first streaming platform for indie filmmakers embracing vertical video
articles.description: Micro-drama apps make billions in consumer spending, so VURT launched its streaming app to allow indie filmmakers to capitalize on the vertical video trend.
articles.summary: Vurt is a new mobile-first platform designed specifically for independent filmmakers and micro-dramas that tap into the growing popularity of vertical videos.
points: Launched by indie filmmaker Viktoria Van Broekhuyzen, creator behind The Last Laugh
Partners with established platforms like MUBI to reach broader audience and monetize content
Offers free trials for users before introducing a subscription-based model
articles.insight: Vurt's vertical video platform could potentially disrupt the streaming industry by providing an alternative channel that caters specifically to indie filmmakers, influencing both user experience and monetization strategies.

articles.title: Google’s Personal Intelligence feature is expanding to all US users
articles.description: Personal Intelligence allows Google's AI assistant to tap into your Google ecosystem, such as Gmail and Google Photos, to provide more tailored responses.
articles.summary: Personal Intelligence allows Google's AI assistant to tap into your Google ecosystem, such as Gmail and Google Photos, to provide more tailored responses

Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Stryker says it’s restoring systems after pro-Iran hackers wiped thousands of employee devices
articles.description: The hack, which brought ongoing widespread disruption to the company's operations, is thought to be the first major cyberattack in the United States in response to the Trump administration's war in Iran.
articles.summary: Pro-Iran hackers caused a significant cyber attack on Stryker Corporation by wiping thousands of employee devices, leading to operational disruption.
points: Stryker experienced an extensive data loss incident affecting many employees' personal and work accounts due to malware introduced through phishing emails.
articles.insight: The attack highlights the vulnerabilities within IT infrastructure, emphasizing the importance of robust cybersecurity measures in protecting against politically motivated threats targeting corporations involved with foreign conflicts.

articles.title: OpenAI expands government footprint with AWS deal, report says
articles.description: OpenAI has reportedly signed a partnership with AWS to sell its AI systems to the U.S. government for classified and unclassified work, marking an expansion beyond its Pentagon deal last month.
articles.summary: OpenAI has partnered with AWS allowing it to sell AI systems directly to the U.S. government for both classified and unclassified tasks. This collaboration extends beyond OpenAI's recent Pentagon deal.
points: OpenAI, known primarily as an open-source artificial intelligence (AI) research firm based in San Francisco, has reportedly signed a partnership with Amazon Web Services (AWS).
This new arrangement enables the AI company to sell its systems directly to government agencies for classified and unclassified work.
The deal expands OpenAI's footprint beyond just selling technology to governments, marking a significant step in commercializing their proprietary models.
articles.insight: This development signifies the increasing importance of AI technologies within government operations and highlights potential pathways for future public-sector contracts with private tech companies. It suggests an expanding role for artificial intelligence solutions, not only in research but also as operational tools.

articles.title: AI’s ‘boys’ club’ could widen the wealth gap for women, says Rana el Kaliouby
articles.description: AI investor Rana el Kaliouby warns that if women are shut out of AI funding and leadership, the consequences will be grim.
articles.summary: Rana el Kaliouby expresses concern over a lack of female representation in artificial intelligence (AI) funding and leadership roles. She warns that this exclusion could lead to widened gender wealth disparities.
points: Women are underrepresented as AI investors, especially in start-ups
Female founders receive only a tiny fraction of venture capital (VC) despite making up almost half the VC workforce worldwide and nearly one quarter globally.
The 'boys' club' culture within AI leadership risks excluding women, which could broaden wealth gaps between men and women.
articles.insight: This news underscores an urgent need for more inclusive practices in the tech industry to ensure equitable opportunities and prevent perpetuating existing gender imbalances. Encouraging diversity can lead not only to fairer outcomes but also potentially improve AI's effectiveness.

articles.title: Oura enters India’s smart ring market with the Ring 4
articles.description: Finnish smart ring maker Oura is finally launching in India, taking on local rivals such as Ultrahuman in a relatively young smart ring market that is becoming price-sensitive thanks to an influx of low-cost options.
articles.summary: Finnish company Oura has entered the Indian smart ring market with its Ring 4 device amidst a burgeoning yet price-sensitive local competition.
points: Oura's launch of the high-priced Ring 4 in India is entering an emerging but sensitive market due to increasing affordable options, challenged by companies like Ultrahuman and OLXRings.
articles.insight: The entry of premium smart ring maker into a price-sensitive Indian market indicates potential for both local adaptation strategies in products offered as well as the need for differentiation to capture consumer interest amidst growing competition.
